message:
fix(sync): add anti-barge checks to mutex try_lock and migrate registry to VecDeque

mutex.rs: try_lock() now checks `!state.waiters.is_empty()` before
granting the lock, preventing a new caller from barging ahead of
threads that have been waiting in the FIFO queue. This matches the
anti-barge pattern already applied to bulkhead and rate_limit.

registry.rs: migrate the waiter queue from Vec to VecDeque so that
wake-ups use pop_front() (O(1)) instead of remove(0) (O(n)).
All push() calls become push_back() for consistent FIFO semantics.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
